---
title: "Projects"
---

## Graduate-Level Projects

Below are selected projects demonstrating my experience in data analysis, biostatistics, and AI-driven public health applications.

---

<div class="project-card">

<h3>LLM-Powered WASH Risk Assessment System</h3>

<p>
This project develops a conversational survey system that uses large language models to collect household-level water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) risk factors. The system supports adaptive questioning, structured data extraction, response validation, and interpretable risk scoring.
</p>

<p><strong>Key Features:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Multi-domain risk framework (demographics, WASH behavior, environmental factors)</li>
<li>Real-time conversational data collection</li>
<li>Structured JSON output for risk scoring</li>
<li>Simulation-based evaluation for consistency and robustness</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>Tools:</strong> Python, Gradio, GPT-4o, Pydantic AI</p>

<a class="button-primary" href="https://github.com/mihotelk/risk-profiler" target="_blank">View on GitHub</a>

</div>

---

<div class="project-card">

<h3>Cancer Symptom-Management RAG System</h3>

<p>
This project builds a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system to support personalized cancer symptom-management recommendations. It integrates patient context, symptom severity, and treatment phase to generate tailored outputs.
</p>

<p><strong>Key Features:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Multi-stage pipeline including retrieval and ranking</li>
<li>Comparison of multiple LLMs under a unified evaluation protocol</li>
<li>Focus on relevance, consistency, and usability</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>Tools:</strong> Python, RAG, MMR retrieval, LLM benchmarking</p>

<a class="button-primary" href="https://github.com/mihotelk/APE_RAG" target="_blank">View on GitHub</a>

</div>

---

<div class="project-card">

<h3>Dietary Assessment using Large Language Models</h3>

<p>
This project evaluates the ability of large language models and multimodal AI systems to assess dietary intake based on user-provided text descriptions and images.
</p>

<p><strong>Key Features:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Text-based and image-based dietary evaluation</li>
<li>Comparison across multiple LLMs and multimodal models</li>
<li>Standardized prompts for fair benchmarking</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>Tools:</strong> GPT-4.1, Claude, DeepSeek, LLaVA</p>

<a class="button-primary" href="https://github.com/mihotelk/DietAI24_Eval" target="_blank">View on GitHub</a>

</div>
